svg.text: eth_hdr_extract — Per-Word Header Field Extraction Pipeline
aligned_d[63:0] + aligned_v (from eth_hdr_realign) → word_cnt increments on each aligned_v
IPv4 L4: T+5 | IPv6 L4: T+8
IPv4 L4: T+6 (+1 vs no VLAN)
IPv4 L4: T+7 (+2 vs no VLAN)
No VLAN path only. Each part buffered across words.
55 LUT / 550 FF / 0 BRAM (large FF count = header field registers)
